_comment: Minimal cylinder example. Set locals_path to the absolute path of locals.txt in this folder before running ai-sw-codegen parameterize.

bindings._comment: First sketch in a fresh doc is always Sketch1. Bind its diameter dim (D1) to PART_DIAMETER.
If you renamed Boss-Extrude1 to Extrude_Body during recording, this matches. Otherwise change to D1@Boss-Extrude1.
